HGSS.699.0001:
Sheesh, the way you attacked! That was
something else! We should meet again!\f
How about giving me your number?[0200,0000]
HGSS.699.0002: I’ll call you when I feel like battling!
HGSS.699.0003:
No? That’s fine.
A definite no is easy to take!\f
I’ll be right here when you’re ready for
a rematch.
HGSS.699.0004:
So you want to register my phone
number for a rematch, huh?[0200,0000]
HGSS.699.0005:
Well, you are special, all right.\f
If only I’d begun training Pokémon when
I was a tad younger...\f
I want you to work hard and succeed
for both of us.\r
So, take this, OK?\f
HGSS.699.0006:
Uh-huh?
Is that a river I hear in the\r
background? You’re nearby!
HGSS.699.0007:
Nothing can match my [0100,000A,0000] now.\f
Yeah, we KO’d a wild [0100,000B,0000]!\f
That was OK, but what I wanted was
to catch it...\f
OK, give me a call again!
HGSS.699.0008:
Nothing can match my [0100,000A,0000] now.\f
And, yesterday, we spotted a wild
[0100,000B,0000].\f
We were debating whether to catch
it or just gain experience battling it.\f
Then, along came another guy,
who caught it! How about that!\f
OK, give me a call again!
HGSS.699.0009:
You’re thinking you’d like to battle me.
Am I right or what?\f
Yep! We’ll meet on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.699.0010:
Haven’t you gone as far as
[0104,0003,0000]?\f
Waiting here is no problem,
but I’d sure like to battle!
HGSS.699.0011: You’ll battle with me again, right?
